Name: Stock Realtime Display
Description: Display stock details in real time

Localization.Uses free EastMoney quotes and supports: Uses free EastMoney quotes and supports A shares, Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, and common indexes.
Localization.Uses Yahoo Finance public data and may h: Uses Yahoo Finance public data and may hit temporary rate limits.
Localization.Requires a Finnhub API key and is best f: Requires a Finnhub API key and is best for US stocks.
Localization.Enter the code, one stock per line: Enter the code, one stock per line
Localization.Please fill in the stock code according: Please fill in the stock code according to the following rules:
Localization.Index examples: 上证指数, 深证成指, 恒生指数, 道琼斯: Index examples: SSE Composite, SZSE Component, Hang Seng Index, Dow Jones
Localization.Compatible legacy input: SH600519, SZ000: Compatible legacy input: SH600519, SZ000001, HK0700, USAAPL, USDJI
